commit.message:
Implement GLFWInput: GLFW-backed InputSystem for input without SFML

- Created src/Input/GLFWInput.h and GLFWInput.cpp implementing the InputSystem
  interface using GLFW callbacks (key, mouse, cursor, window size/close, joystick)
- Each callback pushes InputEvent into an internal queue; pollEvent() drains it
- Bidirectional KeyCode <-> GLFW_KEY_* mapping table for all keyboard keys
- GamepadButton <-> GLFW_GAMEPAD_BUTTON_* mapping with raw joystick fallback
- GamepadAxis mapping with D-pad synthesized from GLFW gamepad buttons
- isKeyPressed() uses glfwGetKey() for instantaneous state
- Gamepad queries use glfwGetGamepadState() with glfwGetJoystickAxes() fallback
- GLRenderer now creates and owns a GLFWInput instance (passed GLFWwindow*)
- WindowResized callback updates GLRenderer's internal size and glViewport
- WindowClosed callback sets GLRenderer's open flag to false
- Added GLFWInput.cpp to CMakeLists.txt sources
- Updated architecture.md with GLFWInput documentation
- Moved completed task to CompletedTasks.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Implement OpenGL text rendering in GLRenderer using FreeType

- Add FreeType-based font loading via loadFont() that stores FT_Face handles
- Implement glyph atlas system: rasterizes ASCII 32-126 into a single GL_RED
  texture per (font, size) pair, cached for reuse across frames
- Add text shader pair: vertex shader passes position+texcoord through
  projection; fragment shader samples atlas red channel as alpha and
  multiplies by a uniform text color
- Implement drawText(): batches all character quads into a single draw call
  with proper bearing offsets, advance spacing, and newline handling
- Implement measureText(): computes width from glyph advances and height
  from font line metrics, with multi-line support
- Add text VAO/VBO initialization and cleanup in constructor/destructor
- Initialize FreeType library in GLRenderer constructor
- Update architecture.md to document new text rendering capabilities
- Move completed task from ImplementationPlan.md to CompletedTasks.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(ci): correct tar stdin flag for gitleaks binary extraction

tar xz gitleaks -C /tmp reads from a file named 'gitleaks', not stdin.
Use tar -xzf - -C /tmp gitleaks to explicitly read from stdin (-f -)
and extract only the gitleaks member to /tmp.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(ci): use bash array for gitleaks SCAN_ARGS to prevent word-splitting

Using a plain string SCAN_ARGS and unquoted $SCAN_ARGS expansion causes
shell word-splitting: '--log-opts=--no-merges --first-parent BASE..HEAD'
splits into three tokens, making '--first-parent' an unknown gitleaks flag.

Switch to a bash array so gitleaks receives '--log-opts' and the full
'--no-merges --first-parent BASE..HEAD' string as two properly-quoted args.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement OpenGL texture loading and sprite rendering in GLRenderer

- Implement loadTexture() using stb_image with GL_NEAREST filtering, RGBA format, and path deduplication
- Implement drawSprite() with dynamic VBO, UV computation from sprite-sheet frame rects, and origin offset
- Add magenta 2x2 fallback texture for failed loads
- Add dedicated sprite VAO/VBO with position + texcoord attributes
- Clean up GL textures in destructor

Optimize BSP entity rendering: hoist active lights, track material state

- Hoist R_ActiveLights out of the per-block loop for non-world BSP
  entities. The bounds are the same (entity->abs_model_bounds) for
  every block, so the light query and uniform upload were redundant.
- Track the last bound material in R_DrawBspDrawElements to skip
  redundant texture binds and 6 material uniform uploads when
  consecutive draw elements share the same material.

commit.message:
feat(grafana): add new rule for Grafana API tokens (#1474)

## Summary

Add `@secretlint/secretlint-rule-grafana`, a new scanner rule that
detects Grafana API tokens.

### Detected patterns

- **`GRAFANA_CLOUD_API_TOKEN`**: tokens with the `glc_` prefix followed
by base64-encoded JWT content. Real tokens start with `glc_eyJ`.
- Regex:
`/(?<!\p{L})glc_[A-Za-z0-9+/]{32,400}={0,2}(?![A-Za-z0-9+/=])/gu`
- **`GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN`**: tokens with the `glsa_` prefix
followed by 32 alphanumeric characters, an underscore, and an
8-character hex checksum.
- Regex:
`/(?<!\p{L})glsa_[A-Za-z0-9]{32}_[A-Fa-f0-9]{8}(?![A-Fa-f0-9])/gu`

The service account token format is fixed (32 chars + `_` + 8 hex),
which minimizes false positives. The Cloud token `glc_` prefix is unique
enough to keep FP risk low despite the base64 body.

### Changes

- New package `packages/@secretlint/secretlint-rule-grafana/` (src,
tests, snapshots, README, LICENSE, tsconfig, package.json)
- `allows` option supported via `@textlint/regexp-string-matcher`
- Messages have `en` and `ja` locales
- Registered in `@secretlint/secretlint-rule-preset-canary` (per
AGENTS.md, syncing to the recommend preset is a separate release-time
task)
- Listed in the root `README.md` rule index

### References

- Grafana Service Account tokens docs
- gitleaks / TruffleHog Grafana detectors
- GitHub Secret Scanning push protection patterns

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm --filter "@secretlint/secretlint-rule-grafana" test` passes
(3 snapshot cases)
- [x] `pnpm --filter "@secretlint/secretlint-rule-preset-canary" test`
passes (includes grafana snapshots)
- [x] `pnpm --filter "@secretlint/secretlint-rule-grafana" build` (tsc)
succeeds
- [x] Full `pnpm test` passes with no regressions

Closes #1443

---------

commit.message:
Implement GLRenderer core with shader management, orthographic projection, and rectangle drawing

- Add Shader class (Shader.h/.cpp) for compiling/linking GLSL programs with
  uniform setters (setMat4, setVec4, setInt) and error logging
- Add GLRenderer class (GLRenderer.h/.cpp) implementing the Renderer interface
  with OpenGL 3.3 Core profile via GLFW + GLAD
- GLRenderer initializes GLFW window, GLAD loader, alpha blending, viewport,
  and framebuffer resize callback
- Implement flat-color shader pair (vertex: projection * model * pos;
  fragment: uniform color)
- Implement clear/display, setView/resetView (top-left origin ortho),
  getWindowSize with resize tracking
- Implement drawRect and drawRectOutlined using persistent unit-quad VAO
  with model-transform (translate + scale); outline as 4 thin quads
- Stub remaining Renderer methods (circle, rounded-rect, texture, text,
  vertex-colored geometry) for later tasks
- Update CMakeLists.txt, architecture.md, ImplementationPlan.md,
  CompletedTasks.md
